title: Wave 6 — Signer adapter boundary and idempotency
goal: Make the signing boundary explicit and testable: define SignerAdapter interface, add devnet LocalKeypairAdapter (Wave 6a, guarded by env flag), add in-process approval idempotency guard, and wire an execute_approved_action MCP tool that gates execution behind the idempotency store and local signer.

reviewBudget.warning: Combined Wave 6 estimate (~435 lines) exceeds the 400-line review budget. Stop after T5_VALIDATE_6A green and open Wave 6b as a separate PR targeting release/compass_migration before starting T6_RED_MCP_EXECUTE.
reviewBudget.splitBoundary: T5_VALIDATE_6A must be green (signerAdapter tests pass, approvalIdempotencyStore tests pass, full suite clean) before starting 6b MCP wiring.
reviewBudget.chainStrategy: stacked-to-main: Wave 6b PR targets release/compass_migration, Wave 6a must merge first.

openQuestions.question: Should LocalKeypairAdapter be implemented in Wave 6, or deferred to Wave 8 (demo hardening)?
openQuestions.resolution: DECIDED: Implement LocalKeypairAdapter in Wave 6a. Guard strictly behind COMPASS_LOCAL_SIGNER_ENABLED=true env flag with devnet restriction.

openQuestions.question: Should the in-process idempotency store be in-memory only, or should it persist to a durable store (SQLite/JSONL) immediately?
openQuestions.resolution: DECIDED: In-memory only for MVP. Upgrade to durable store in Wave 8+ if demo hardening requires it.

openQuestions.question: What should execute_approved_action return on success? (a) signer-ready metadata for frontend Dynamic wallet, (b) call local signer and return tx signature, or (c) both based on env config?
openQuestions.resolution: DECIDED: Use LocalKeypairAdapter when COMPASS_LOCAL_SIGNER_ENABLED=true and return tx signature when implementation has transaction bytes available. If LOCAL_SIGNER_NOT_CONFIGURED, the tool returns DENY with LOCAL_SIGNER_NOT_CONFIGURED. Actual signAndSendTransaction call with VersionedTransaction deferred to Wave 7; Wave 6b establishes the handler path and returns ALLOW with signerPath metadata.

openQuestions.question: Should execute_approved_action write back to the on-chain PDA to mark the approval consumed, or rely solely on the in-process idempotency store?
openQuestions.resolution: DECIDED: Rely on in-process store for MVP. The Anchor program marks the action as executed when the guarded_transfer instruction runs; Compass does not need a separate PDA marking.

openQuestions.question: Should execute_approved_action require a full OnchainActionApprovalProof, or accept a lighter proof for early devnet testing?
openQuestions.resolution: DECIDED: Accept only candidateId for now. No call to verifyActionApproval in Wave 6. Document that full OnchainActionApprovalProof and on-chain verification are deferred to Wave 7. Approval input schema requires only candidateId; approvalProof field is omitted from Wave 6 tool schema.

acceptanceCriteria: Compass backend does not hold user private keys in any non-devnet, non-demo code path.
SignerAdapter interface is exported from a contracts file covering getAddress, signTransaction, and optional signAndSendTransaction.
LocalKeypairAdapter is gated behind COMPASS_LOCAL_SIGNER_ENABLED=true and throws LOCAL_SIGNER_MAINNET_FORBIDDEN for any non-devnet RPC.
ApprovalIdempotencyStore.consume returns ok:true the first time and ok:false DUPLICATE_APPROVAL_EXECUTION on repeats.
execute_approved_action MCP tool checks the idempotency store and the signer adapter before returning ALLOW.
A duplicate execute_approved_action call with the same candidateId returns DENY with DUPLICATE_APPROVAL_EXECUTION.
execute_approved_action with LOCAL_SIGNER_NOT_CONFIGURED returns DENY with LOCAL_SIGNER_NOT_CONFIGURED.
Direct sign_and_send_transaction remains denied with an updated message referencing execute_approved_action.
Backend tests cover all acceptance criteria.
nonGoals: No Dynamic SDK integration in backend
No keeper or automated execution engine
No transaction simulation beyond existing gateway paths
No verifyActionApproval call in Wave 6 (on-chain proof verification deferred to Wave 7)
No actual VersionedTransaction signing in Wave 6 execute handler (deferred to Wave 7 when unsigned tx bytes are passed)
verification: Manual: call execute_approved_action twice with same candidateId and confirm second call returns DENY DUPLICATE_APPROVAL_EXECUTION
Manual: attempt createSignerAdapter without COMPASS_LOCAL_SIGNER_ENABLED and confirm factory returns LOCAL_SIGNER_NOT_CONFIGURED
Manual: set COMPASS_LOCAL_SIGNER_ENABLED=true with a mainnet RPC URL and confirm createSignerAdapter returns LOCAL_SIGNER_MAINNET_FORBIDDEN

tasks.title: Add RED signer adapter tests
tasks.description: Write tests for SignerAdapter interface, LocalKeypairAdapter, createSignerAdapter factory, devnet restriction, and idempotency store before implementation.
testsSpec: SignerAdapter interface: a class satisfying the interface compiles and getAddress is callable
LocalKeypairAdapter.getAddress returns the correct base58 address for a test keypair
createSignerAdapter returns LOCAL_SIGNER_NOT_CONFIGURED when COMPASS_LOCAL_SIGNER_ENABLED is absent
createSignerAdapter returns LOCAL_SIGNER_MAINNET_FORBIDDEN when RPC URL contains 'mainnet'
approvalIdempotencyStore.consume returns ok:true on first call
approvalIdempotencyStore.consume returns DUPLICATE_APPROVAL_EXECUTION on second call with same ID
approvalIdempotencyStore.consume returns ok:true for a different ID after a prior ID was consumed
No legacy/ import appears in any new Wave 6a file

tasks.title: Implement signer adapter contracts and local keypair adapter
tasks.description: Create signerAdapterContracts.ts, signerAdapter.ts with LocalKeypairAdapter and createSignerAdapter factory. Keep types/contracts separate from behavior.

tasks.title: Add RED idempotency store tests
tasks.description: Write tests for ApprovalIdempotencyStore.consume single-consume semantics and clear() for test teardown.
testsSpec: consume returns ok:true on first call for candidateId
consume returns ok:false DUPLICATE_APPROVAL_EXECUTION on repeat call
consume returns ok:true for different candidateId after prior consumption
has returns correct boolean state
clear() resets store state

tasks.title: Implement approval idempotency store
tasks.description: Create approvalIdempotencyStore.ts with module-level singleton store. Module-level singleton (singleton per server process); clear() is test-only.

tasks.title: Validate Wave 6a and pause for review
tasks.description: Run full validation suite and stop for parent review before starting Wave 6b MCP wiring.

tasks.title: Add RED MCP execute_approved_action tests
tasks.description: Write tests for execute_approved_action tool: registry entry, routing, idempotency, signer path, audit, and sign_and_send_transaction regression.
testsSpec: execute_approved_action is listed in tools/list with riskClass: SIGNING
handleMcpToolCall with sign_and_send_transaction still returns DENY (regression)
handleMcpToolCall with execute_approved_action and missing candidateId returns REQUIRE_ADDITIONAL_CONTEXT
handleMcpToolCall with valid candidateId that was already consumed returns DENY with DUPLICATE_APPROVAL_EXECUTION
handleMcpToolCall with LOCAL_SIGNER_NOT_CONFIGURED returns DENY with LOCAL_SIGNER_NOT_CONFIGURED
handleMcpToolCall with valid candidateId and LOCAL_SIGNER_NOT_CONFIGURED returns DENY (no ALLOW in Wave 6)
Audit event is emitted for every execute attempt (allow and deny)
No raw transaction data leaks into MCP results or audit metadata

tasks.title: Register and route execute_approved_action tool
tasks.description: Add EXECUTE_APPROVED_ACTION to MCP contracts, registry, and router. Implement handleExecuteApprovedActionTool handler. Update sign_and_send_transaction deny message.

tasks.title: Validate and pause for review
tasks.description: Run full validation suite. Stop for parent review before proceeding to Wave 7.
